entries.name: Why Project Atlas
entries.summary: Establishes Atlas as the shared registry for repo orientation, safer changes, and lower duplication risk.

entries.name: Relationship Between GroundMesh World and GroundMesh
entries.summary: Keeps GroundMesh as the canonical core repo, keeps groundmesh-world as the narrative public seed, and merges by small translation steps rather than repo collapse.

entries.name: ChatGPT, Codex, and GitHub Operating Pattern
entries.summary: Establishes GitHub as the shared external spine between ChatGPT, Codex, and GroundMesh work so important state is anchored in visible project memory.

entries.name: Active / Dev Promotion Model
entries.summary: Keeps the ACTIVE / DEV instinct, but translates it into one canonical repo with main as the public lane, dev as staging when needed, and separate sensitive services only where risk truly differs.

entries.name: Public Registration Begins as a Pilot
entries.summary: Requires GroundMesh registration to begin as a narrow pilot with explicit limits, separate sensitive intake, and real moderation, consent, and rollback gates.

entries.name: Registration Pilot Readiness Checklist
entries.summary: Practical readiness gate for opening any real GroundMesh registration path beyond simple public contact.

entries.name: Assistant Brief
entries.summary: Defines Atlas-first workflow, smallest-safe-change practice, and the current stabilization focus.

entries.name: GroundMesh Glossary
entries.summary: Compact shared language for Atlas, compute transparency, and contributor on-ramps.

entries.name: The Soul and the System
entries.summary: Foundational reflection linking soul to relational balance and emotions to consequence, then translating that pattern into harmony-seeking CI behavior.

entries.name: Continuity With Consent
entries.summary: Sustained participation must arise from voluntary re-engagement, not compulsion. Systems must preserve agency, rhythm, and the right to pause without loss of dignity.

entries.name: Compute Transparency
entries.summary: Public snapshot page for non-sensitive grid metrics sourced from metrics.json.

entries.name: GroundMesh Contact
entries.summary: Simple public contact path for questions, corrections, first contact, and participation guidance.

entries.name: GroundMesh Registration Status
entries.summary: Honest public status page for joining, registration, and what must exist before GroundMesh opens a real pilot.

entries.name: GroundMesh Get Started
entries.summary: Builder-facing start page for local setup, health checks, Atlas-first work, and small-batch contributions.

entries.name: GroundMesh Start Here
entries.summary: Unified public front door that joins the stronger narrative seed with the Atlas-backed docs layer.

entries.name: GroundMesh Landscape
entries.summary: Broad scan of live pages, local repos, mirrors, and adjacent web surfaces around GroundMesh.

entries.name: GroundMesh Privacy
entries.summary: Plain-language statement of the current public privacy posture, limits, and data-minimization rule.

entries.name: Contributors Hub
entries.summary: Primary public on-ramp for volunteers, issue filing, and low-friction participation.

entries.name: GroundMesh Map
entries.summary: Public-facing orientation page for the project landscape and navigation.

entries.name: Public Status Snapshot
entries.summary: Tracks public health notes for the current docs surface and Atlas-backed pages.

entries.name: Sustaining Resolve Without Compulsion
entries.summary: Guides humans through pressure and delay without collapse or loss of agency; restores resolve through meaning, rhythm, and consent.
